features: PACK OF 3: Indulge in reusable luxury with these 3 Jasmine & Apple Blossom anti-bacterial hand wash bottles
KEY FEATURES: Infused with jasmine, apple blossom and mandarin for a delightful fragrance experience
VEGAN FRIENDLY: Made from vegan-friendly ingredients, suitable for those who opt for cruelty-free products
PROTECTION: Anti-bacterial formula helps fight germs and keeps hands clean and protected
PREMIUM QUALITY: Baylis & Harding hand wash is made to delight the senses while promoting cleanliness and hygiene
description: Product Description Our best-selling Jasmine & Apple Blossom fragranced hand wash, complete with a rich crème formulation and the reassurance of anti-bacterial protection. The trusted way to maintain impeccable hand hygiene, our anti-bacterial hand wash is your everyday elevated essential. With its crisp and fruity Jasmine & Apple blossom fragrance, this superior soap removes 99.9% of bacteria whilst leaving your skin feeling fresh, hygienic and beautifully clean. Jasmine & Apple Blossom - Fruity accords of apple and mandarin descend to a floral heart of jasmine and powdery violet notes cushioned by a delicate musky base Ingredients Aqua (Water, Eau), Sodium Laureth Sulfate, Cocamidopropyl Betaine, Citric Acid, Sodium Chloride, Disodium Edta, Parfum (Fragrance), Sodium Benzoate, Glycerin, Glycol Distearate, Potassium Sorbate, Sodium Methyl Cocoyl Taurate, Tocopheryl Acetate, Lactic Acid, Sodium Hydroxide, Hexylene Glycol, Tetramethyl Acetyloctahydronaphthalenes. Directions Lather & Rinse Safety Warning "WARNING: AVOID CONTACT WITH EYES. IF PRODUCT GETS IN THE EYES RINSE IMMEDIATELY WITH CLEAN WARM WATER. IF SKIN IRRITATION OCCURS DISCONTINUE USE. IF IRRITATION PERSISTS CONSULT YOUR DOCTOR." Legal Disclaimer Unless expressly indicated in the product description, Amazon.co.uk is not the manufacturer of the products sold on our website. While we work to ensure that product information on our website is correct, manufacturers may alter their product information. This notice does not affect your legal rights. You should contact your health care provider immediately if you suspect that you have a medical problem. You should always read the labels, warnings and instructions provided with the product before using or consuming it and not solely rely on the information presented on our website.
